academic_defense.target_audience: 答辩委员会与学术同行
academic_defense.use_case: 学位论文答辩、学术报告、科研进展汇报
academic_defense.core_message: 研究问题、方法、结果与贡献
academic_defense.image_approach: Primarily A) No images on data slides; user-provided figures for research charts when needed

china_telecom_template.target_audience: 政企客户与内部管理层
china_telecom_template.use_case: 电信方案汇报、政企数字化转型、招商推介
china_telecom_template.core_message: 方案价值、实施路径与预期成效
china_telecom_template.style_descriptor: authoritative enterprise-government hybrid, structured and restrained

typography_plan.body_stack: "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", "Source Han Sans SC", Arial, sans-serif

china_telecom_template.image_approach: Mixed B) Placeholder blocks and D) Web-sourced for skyline or product visuals

government_blue.target_audience: 政府部门与项目评审方
government_blue.use_case: 政务汇报、重点项目推介、规划方案解读
government_blue.core_message: 项目背景、进展成效与下一步计划
government_blue.style_descriptor: grand tech-forward government style, modern and professional
government_blue.image_approach: Primarily A) No images; D) Web-sourced for project photos when needed

government_red.target_audience: 党政机关与党建学习受众
government_red.use_case: 党建工作汇报、政策解读、专题学习
government_red.core_message: 政策要点、落实举措与成效总结
government_red.style_descriptor: authoritative dignified government style, red-blue accents
government_red.image_approach: Primarily A) No images; user-provided photos for event coverage when needed

ai_ops.target_audience: 技术管理层与架构评审方
ai_ops.use_case: AI 运维架构、数字化转型、智慧基础设施方案
ai_ops.core_message: 架构分层、能力模块与落地路径
ai_ops.style_descriptor: information-dense telecom enterprise style, modular zoning
ai_ops.image_approach: Primarily A) Diagram-heavy slides; B) Placeholder for architecture screenshots

pixel_retro.use_case: 技术分享、编程教程、游戏介绍
pixel_retro.core_message: 核心概念、演示与互动亮点
pixel_retro.style_descriptor: retro gaming neon cyberpunk, 8-bit geek aesthetic
pixel_retro.image_approach: Mixed C) AI-generated pixel art and user screenshots

medical_university.target_audience: 医学同行与临床教学受众
medical_university.use_case: 医学学术报告、病例讨论、医院工作汇报
medical_university.core_message: 临床问题、证据与诊疗/研究结论
medical_university.style_descriptor: professional medical academic, trustworthy and life-affirming
medical_university.image_approach: User-provided clinical images and diagrams; A) No decorative stock photos

psychology_attachment.target_audience: 心理咨询从业者与培训学员
psychology_attachment.use_case: 心理治疗培训、咨询案例分析、专业分享
psychology_attachment.core_message: 理论框架、案例理解与干预要点
psychology_attachment.style_descriptor: warm healing professional, secure-base visual metaphor
psychology_attachment.image_approach: Primarily A) Concept diagrams; minimal photography for case anonymization

中国电建_常规.target_audience: 业主方、合作伙伴与集团内部
中国电建_常规.use_case: 工程项目汇报、技术方案、商务洽谈
中国电建_常规.core_message: 工程概况、技术亮点与实施保障
中国电建_常规.style_descriptor: POWERCHINA standard, composed state-owned enterprise style
中国电建_常规.image_approach: User-provided project photos; D) Web-sourced for engineering stock when approved

中国电建_现代.target_audience: 国际客户与高端商务受众
中国电建_现代.use_case: 重大工程展示、国际市场推广、科技创新发布
中国电建_现代.core_message: 品牌叙事、技术成就与国际化愿景
中国电建_现代.style_descriptor: grand modern precision, deep blue tech gradient, international vision
中国电建_现代.image_approach: High-quality project hero images; C) AI-generated architectural visuals when needed

中汽研_商务.target_audience: 汽车厂商与认证合作方
中汽研_商务.use_case: 产品认证展示、检测评价汇报、技术推广
中汽研_商务.core_message: 认证能力、标准体系与服务价值
中汽研_商务.style_descriptor: CATARC modern tech-business, authoritative and composed
中汽研_商务.image_approach: User-provided product and lab photos; minimal decorative imagery

季度汇报.use_case: 季度工作汇报、经营分析、目标复盘与下季度计划
季度汇报.core_message: 数据增长, 目标达成, 下季度计划
季度汇报.style_descriptor: professional quarterly report, data-driven, restrained government-enterprise tone

typography_plan.title_stack: "Source Han Sans SC", "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", sans-serif
typography_plan.body_stack: "Source Han Sans SC", "Microsoft YaHei", Arial, sans-serif

季度汇报.image_approach: Data charts on content slides; D) Web-sourced for supporting visuals when approved

学术答辩.use_case: 学位论文答辩、学术报告、科研成果汇报
学术答辩.core_message: 研究贡献, 方法论, 创新点

typography_plan.title_stack: "Source Han Serif SC", SimSun, "Times New Roman", serif
typography_plan.body_stack: "Source Han Serif SC", SimSun, "Times New Roman", serif

学术答辩.image_approach: Primarily A) No decorative images; user-provided figures; D) Web-sourced for reference visuals when needed

产品发布.target_audience: 媒体, 客户, 合作伙伴
产品发布.use_case: 新品发布会、产品亮点推介、上市计划沟通
产品发布.core_message: 产品亮点, 差异化, 上市时间

typography_plan.title_stack: "Source Han Sans SC", "Microsoft YaHei", "Segoe UI", sans-serif
typography_plan.body_stack: Inter, "Source Han Sans SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif

产品发布.image_approach: C) AI-generated hero images for cover and feature highlights; product screenshots when available

融资路演.use_case: 融资路演、商业计划书演示、投资人沟通
融资路演.core_message: 市场规模, 商业模式, 团队, 融资需求
融资路演.style_descriptor: investor-grade, premium, concise narrative with strong data hierarchy

typography_plan.title_stack: Montserrat, "Source Han Sans SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif
typography_plan.body_stack: Montserrat, "Source Han Sans SC", "Microsoft YaHei", Arial, sans-serif

融资路演.image_approach: C) AI-generated high-quality visuals for market and vision slides; minimal stock clutter

培训课件.use_case: 内部培训、讲师课件、操作指引与案例教学
培训课件.core_message: 知识点, 操作步骤, 案例

typography_plan.title_stack: "Source Han Sans SC", "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", sans-serif
typography_plan.body_stack: "Source Han Sans SC", "Microsoft YaHei", Arial, sans-serif

培训课件.image_approach: Mixed illustrative diagrams, step screenshots, and B) Placeholder blocks for exercises

商务洽谈.use_case: 商务方案洽谈、客户提案、合作模式沟通
商务洽谈.core_message: 解决方案, 案例背书, 合作模式

typography_plan.title_stack: "Source Han Sans SC", "Microsoft YaHei", "PingFang SC", sans-serif
typography_plan.body_stack: "Source Han Sans SC", "Microsoft YaHei", Arial, sans-serif

商务洽谈.image_approach: Case-study photography and D) Web-sourced client/industry visuals when approved

_schema_notes.keywords_to_template: Maps keyword or tag to layout template ID, e.g. 学术 -> academic_defense, 招商 -> china_telecom_template.
_schema_notes.scene_presets: Full scene configuration objects. Keys may be layout template IDs (legacy) or user-facing scene names (季度汇报, 学术答辩, …). layout_template must exist under templates/layouts/.
